arts.ttl: 'Empty mentally' - Pep Guardiola makes admission over Man City favourite
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola took time to acknowledge how much he has been helped by Bernardo Silva this season

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes 'extraordinary' Aston Villa remark as Man City boss speaks out
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola described the win as "important" while stressing the need to keep calm and carry on after his side secured a dramatic 2-1 victory over Aston Villa to boost their Champions League hopes. The result saw City move up two places in the Premier League table to third with four games to play, with Unai Enery's Villa left two points outside the top five in seventh.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's preferred transfer destination named as Aston Villa ponder £40m move for Man United loanee
arts.sum: The England international's stint at Villa Park will come to an end at the end of the season, and to date he has four goals and six assists in 17 matches across all competitions.

arts.ttl: 'A problem': Roy Keane rips into £20m Aston Villa player as he delivers brutal Villans verdict after last night's City loss
arts.sum: Aston Villa have suffered a huge blow in their hopes of securing Champions League football after losing late on to Manchester City on Tuesday night....

arts.ttl: Ederson, Haaland - Man City injury latest and return dates as five players set to miss FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Nottingham Forest at Wembley in the FA Cup semi-final this weekend

arts.ttl: Ederson future: Man City goalkeeper 'exploring' exit as Brazilian earmarks 'preferred destination'
arts.sum: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson is reportedly exploring possible exit routes as he identifies his preferred destination for a summer move.

arts.ttl: So important – Pep Guardiola delighted by late winner against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Matheus Nunes’ stoppage-time goal kept Manchester City’s Champions League hopes in their own hands.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes shock admission about Man City's season after they boosted Champions League hopes with dramatic winner against Aston Villa
arts.sum: The Premier League champions - for a few more days at least - moved into third place, four points clear of sixth-place Villa, thanks to Matheus Nunes' 94th-minute strike.

arts.ttl: Why did Marmoush not get an assist in FPL?
arts.sum: The Egyptian played a key role in Bernardo's goal on Tuesday The post Why did Marmoush not get an assist in FPL? appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

“Now we are here he didn’t play as much but I don’t forget in November, December, January, February, March, when we didn’t win one single game and he was there every single time. “We didn’t create much, but it’s not easy against Aston Villa.
